content:
Key Findings

  • LIBERATA UK LTD received £36.7M from Burnley Borough Council, accounting for 10.3% of total spend.
  • The top 5 suppliers, including LIBERATA UK LTD, received a combined £136.7M, representing 38.5% of total spend.
  • LIBERATA UK LTD was the largest single supplier to Burnley Borough Council over the 5-year period.
  • The top 10 suppliers received £184.4M, which is 51.9% of the total £355.2M spend.
  • The remaining suppliers outside the top 10 received £170.8M, which is 48.1% of the total spend.

LIBERATA UK LTD: Burnley's Largest Supplier

LIBERATA UK LTD stands out as Burnley Borough Council's largest supplier, receiving £36.7M over the five-year period from 2021/22 to 2025/26. This substantial amount represents 10.3% of the council's total expenditure of £355.2M. The relationship between Burnley and LIBERATA UK LTD highlights the council's reliance on a select group of suppliers for essential services.

The top 5 suppliers, including LIBERATA UK LTD, collectively received £136.7M, which is 38.5% of the total spend. This concentration of spending among a few suppliers is a common trend in local government procurement, often driven by the need for specialised services or long-term contracts. However, it also raises questions about competition and value for money, which are critical for ensuring public funds are used efficiently.

Comparing Burnley's Top Suppliers

To provide context, LIBERATA UK LTD received significantly more than the second-largest supplier, MAPLE GROVE DEVELOPMENTS LTD, which received £30.8M. The third-largest supplier, BARNFIELD INVESTMENT PROPERTIES LTD, received £29.4M. This comparison underscores the prominence of LIBERATA UK LTD in Burnley's spending landscape.

The top 10 suppliers received a combined £184.4M, which is 51.9% of the total spend. This high concentration of spending among a few suppliers is notable and warrants further scrutiny to ensure that the council is achieving the best possible value for money. The remaining suppliers outside the top 10 received £170.8M, which is 48.1% of the total spend, indicating a more diverse range of smaller transactions.

Rank Supplier Amount % of Total
1 LIBERATA UK LTD £36.7M 10.3%
2 MAPLE GROVE DEVELOPMENTS LTD £30.8M 8.7%
3 BARNFIELD INVESTMENT PROPERTIES LTD £29.4M 8.3%
4 GELDARDS £20.3M 5.7%
5 URBASER LTD £19.5M 5.5%

What You Can Do

  • Submit a Freedom of Information request to Burnley Borough Council about the specific services provided by LIBERATA UK LTD and the terms of their contracts.
  • Attend council committee meetings, which are open to the public, to learn more about procurement decisions and ask questions about supplier relationships.
  • Check the council's published contracts register to review the terms and conditions of contracts awarded to LIBERATA UK LTD and other top suppliers.
  • Write to your local councillor to express any concerns about the concentration of spending among a few suppliers and to request more transparency in procurement processes.
  • Visit aidoge.co.uk to explore the full spending data and analyse trends in Burnley Borough Council's expenditure.
This article is based on Burnley Borough Council's published spending data covering 2021/22 to 2025/26. All figures are drawn directly from transactions published under the Local Government Transparency Code. Analysis by AI DOGE.
